title: The Crossroads the Mesh Hasn't Named Yet

features.name: the branching path
features.desc-on-touch: roads meet here but do not decide which way to go. the archive stands at the crossing, aware of all directions, committing to none.

features.name: question marker
features.desc-on-touch: something here emits uncertainty as a signal. the archive questions itself at this threshold. the doubt is not a flaw; it is a feature.

features.name: green signal
features.desc-on-touch: the grass below the roads grows taller where the paths hesitate. life prefers indecision to false certainty.

features.name: undecided monument
features.desc-on-touch: a standing thing that refuses to point. it simply marks the place where choice becomes impossible — or where all choices remain equally real.

features.name: mote-drift
features.desc-on-touch: particles hover in stillness. they could move in any direction; that they don't move at all is its own kind of answer.

inscription: the archive learned that asking the question is more honest than pretending it knows the answer.

file.name: Crossroads_Undecided_Archive_Query.txt
file.note: ERROR: archive has exceeded witness — the question chamber asking what questions it can contain

exits.label: eastward on one of the roads, maybe
upward to where decisions have already been made
westward to where the paths still diverge
